name: send_sms
description: Send an SMS text message to a specified phone number using the Vonage Messages API. The message is sent via the SMS channel. You must provide the recipient number in E.164 format, a sender number or alphanumeric sender ID, and the message text. Returns a unique message UUID that can be used to track delivery status via webhooks.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g., '14155550123'). Must include country code without the '+' prefix.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: The sender phone number in E.164 format or an alphanumeric sender ID (max 11 characters). Must be a Vonage virtual number or pre-approved sender ID.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The messaging channel to use. Must be 'sms' for SMS messages.

parameters.name: message_type
parameters.description: The type of message content. Use 'text' for plain text SMS messages.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The body of the SMS message. Standard SMS supports up to 160 characters; longer messages are sent as multipart SMS and may incur additional charges.

parameters.name: client_ref
parameters.description: A client-defined reference string for tracking purposes. Maximum 100 characters. Included in delivery receipt webhooks.

body.text: Your order #4829 has shipped and will arrive by March 5. Track at: https://track.example.com/4829
